changes: Fix queue button width on book detail page not matching Edit/Delete buttons on mobile
Fix drag-to-reorder ghost positioning on scrolled pages and mobile
Add reading queue: plan and reorder books to read next
Queue supports both library books and external entries (title, author, URL)
Touch-friendly drag-to-reorder on queue page using Pointer Events API (no external library)
Add to queue from Books list, Book detail, and Recommendations pages
Starting a read automatically removes the book from the queue
Auto-link prompt when a new library book matches an existing external queue entry
Replace numeric star rating with a 5-tier emoji system (🚫 Abandoned, ☹️ Didn't like, 😑 Ok, 🙂 Liked, 🤩 Really liked)
Migrate verbose book formats: 'Kindle eBook' → 'Kindle', 'Kobo eBook' → 'Kobo', 'Apple eBook' → 'Apple'
Child books now hide Date Purchased, Cost, Discounts, and Paid fields in the edit form
Bundle books derive their display rating from the average of rated child books when no explicit rating is set
Add changelog to the System page, populated from the full project history
Browser tab and toolbar now reflect the app’s primary colour via theme-color meta tags
Click any book cover to view it full-size in a lightbox overlay
Completed but unrated books now show an inline half-star rating widget on the detail page
Recommendations page now includes a Recent Additions section showing the 10 most recently added unread books
Fix bundle child book search: results were not appearing and clicking results did nothing
Fix Amazon series number extraction picking up the next-in-series value instead of the current book
Amazon import now parses series text (e.g. “Book 5 of 16: Series Name”) into series name and number separately
Bundle detail page hides the quick-add card once all expected child books are linked
Warn and prompt for confirmation when adding a series with a duplicate name
Bundle child books hide bundle-specific fields in their edit form
Bundle detail page now shows a quick-add card to link child books directly from the detail view
Read date inputs now warn if the year looks like a typo (before 1900 or more than 2 years in the future)
Bundle books are now shown as completed when all of their child books have been completed
Add explicit parent-child book relationships for bundles and omnibus editions
Child books show a corner overlay badge on book grid cards
Bundle edit page includes a searchable child-book picker
Add Bundles filter to the book list page
Alias author names now appear in the book form author autocomplete
Various UX improvements: series number label, form field ordering, and button styling
Fix apostrophe handling in series and author quick-add fields
Add Books Added per Year bar chart to the Statistics page
Add Most Read Authors (by distinct books) tables to the Statistics page with rank numbers
Fix internal server error and UndefinedError on the System page when a series scan is active or has just completed
Add Page Number distribution pie chart to Statistics with click-through filtering to the book list
Books on the author detail page are now sorted by series order
Add page-load progress bar at the top of the page
Add spending per year chart to Statistics
Fix progress bar persisting when using browser back/forward navigation
Fix Docker image size by excluding build artifacts
Pressing Enter in the import URL dialog now triggers the import
Improved Amazon description extraction with additional CSS selectors and a Goodreads fallback
Fix Total Saved stat to use cost minus paid rather than the discounts field
Add “Read” overlay badges to book grid cards across all pages
Fix book cover aspect ratio to reduce unwanted clipping
Add Recently Added section to the dashboard
Redesign Currently Reading section as a horizontal scroll card layout
Fix recommendations page layout with responsive book cover grid
Add dark mode toggle with localStorage persistence
Fix hamburger menu icon visibility in light mode
Add per-page selector to Series and Authors list pages
Add Complete filter to series list
Add series book count scanner to System page
Show read count and completion status on series detail page
Add No Links and Incomplete filters to series list page
Add Recommendations page with series continuations and random unread picks
Auto-focus the URL field when opening the import dialog
Add automated backup script with rolling daily/weekly/monthly retention
Add most-read books and authors sections to the Statistics page
Add mobile responsive layout with hamburger menu
Add Docker deployment with build and deploy scripts
Add quick-add buttons to import suggestions for authors and series
Add searchable datalist dropdowns for form fields
Add pagination to the authors list
Add lazy image loading throughout
Tune gunicorn configuration for SQLite workloads
Add statistics page with charts and summary metrics
Add percentage labels to pie and doughnut chart tooltips
Add total pages and series count to author detail page
Add Abandon button for active reads
Add System page with Goodreads genre scanner
Import genres as tags when importing a book from Goodreads
Add tag statistics chart
Add option to include tags in search results
Add tags for books, authors, and series
Add tag management utility to System page
Rearrange book detail page layout
Show author aliases prominently on author pages
Make editing forms more compact with side-by-side fields and collapsible sections
Format series numbers to hide trailing .0
Add automatic book description search from Amazon and Goodreads
Add Start Reading button to book detail page
Add read/unread filter to books list
Add configurable per-page dropdown to books list
Add series book count update via direct Goodreads/Amazon lookup
Add reading duration display to book detail page and dashboard
Add Mark Complete and Abandon buttons to dashboard active reads
Fix multi-author book import
Add book import from Amazon, Goodreads, and StoryGraph URLs
Add series search picker in book form
Add search functionality to series list
Improve series and authors list pages with grid layouts
Replace author multi-select with search-based tag picker
Migrate initial Notion book data
Dashboard improvements
Initial release: book, author, series, and read tracking with basic dashboard and search
